summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Telugu language learning app (iteration 2). Backend API functioning perfectly (100% success). Frontend shows significant improvements from previous iteration with most navigation and UI issues resolved. Main remaining issue is YouTube video player iframe loading in rhymes section.

integration_issues.issue: YouTube player iframe not loading properly in modal despite modal opening correctly
Some YouTube thumbnails returning 404 errors (2 out of 6 rhymes showing placeholder images)

passed_tests: Backend API health and all endpoints (9/9 tests passed)
Homepage loads with correct Telugu title and 3 section cards
Letters page navigation and Telugu vowel grid (15 vowels found)
Letters page grid and single view modes with navigation controls
Words page navigation and all 3 categories (Animals, Fruits, Colors)
Words category selection and word card interactions with audio triggers
Rhymes page navigation with 6 YouTube rhyme cards displayed
Video player modal opens and closes properly with all control buttons
Stickers reward modal opens and closes correctly
Navigation between all pages works smoothly
Progress tracking and analytics APIs functioning
Modal z-index issues resolved (no more blocking navigation)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix YouTube video player iframe loading issue in rhymes modal. The modal opens correctly and controls work, but the actual video iframe from YouTube is not loading properly, preventing video playback. Also investigate the 404 errors for some YouTube thumbnail images.
